name: Nestle 100 Grand Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten each caramel with your fingers into a rectangle about 1/4-inch thick.
2. Melt the chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl in a microwave set on half power for 2 minutes. Stir halfway through the heating time. Melt thoroughly, but do not overheat.
3. Add the Rice Krispies and stir just until blended.
4. Dip each caramel into the melted chocolate to coat completely and place on waxed paper. Cool until firm at room temperature, 1 to 2 hours.
